message:
fix(codegen): Improve callable() builtin detection

callable() now correctly returns true for:
- Builtin functions (len, print, etc.) via BuiltinMap lookup
- Module-level user functions via module_level_funcs
- Classes (callable as constructors) via class_registry
- Class instances with __call__ method

Previously callable(len) would return false because len wasn't
recognized as a function type in type inference. Now we check
multiple sources to detect callable status.
